objective: Wire the durable job store into the Local Brain server, creating POST /jobs, GET /jobs, and GET /jobs/:id API endpoints so the operator console can observe and manage background work.

durable_job_store_wiring: companion/server.js: import createDurableJobStore, initialize shared instance with data/jobs/ directory
job_api_endpoints: POST /jobs — accepts { type, trackId/workflowId, input, options }, validates, persists, returns 201 with job record or 400 on validation failure
GET /jobs — lists all jobs with optional status and limit query filters; returns summary array (jobId, type, trackId/workflowId, status, createdAt, attempts, lease)
GET /jobs/:id — returns full job record including metadata, lease, evidenceRefs, result/error, and timestamps; 404 for unknown IDs
health_integration: GET /health includes jobTotals with counts by all seven statuses (queued, claimed, running, completed, failed, cancelled, paused_review)
tests: scripts/test-jobs-api.js (64/64 — covers create track job, create workflow job, invalid type, missing trackId/workflowId, empty list, list with jobs, status filtering, get by ID, get not found, health jobTotals, persistence across restart)

results: POST /jobs with type track creates and persists a job, returns 201 with full job record
POST /jobs with type workflow creates and persists a job, returns 201 with full job record
POST /jobs with invalid input returns 400 with error envelope
GET /jobs returns all jobs (empty array when none exist)
GET /jobs/:id returns full job for valid ID, 404 for invalid
GET /health includes jobTotals with correct counts by status
Server restart reloads jobs from data/jobs/*.json — GET /jobs returns previously created jobs
No changes to existing endpoint response envelopes

passed: POST /jobs with type track creates and persists a job, returns 201 with the full job record
POST /jobs with type workflow creates and persists a job, returns 201 with the full job record
POST /jobs with invalid input returns 400 with an error envelope
GET /jobs returns all jobs (empty array when none exist)
GET /jobs/:id returns the full job for a valid id, 404 for invalid
GET /health includes jobTotals with correct counts by status
Server restart reloads jobs from data/jobs/*.json — GET /jobs returns previously created jobs
node scripts/test-jobs-api.js passes all test cases
Existing tests still pass: node scripts/contract-test.js, node scripts/test-durable-job-store.js
No changes to existing response envelope shapes

scope_notes: Background worker polling loop is the next task — not yet implemented
Human-gate endpoints (POST /jobs/:id/review, paused_review transitions) are a later task
Cancel, retry, or any mutation endpoints other than create are later tasks
Operator console UI (HTML/CSS/JS dashboard) not included
companion/core/durable-job-store.js and its schema not modified — store is complete as-is
stop_conditions_honored: No modifications to existing /tracks/run, /workflows/run, /tasks/run, or /analyze endpoints or their response envelopes
No modification to companion/core/durable-job-store.js or its schema
next_milestones: Background worker (polling loop that claims and executes jobs) — queue item 07-durable-background-execution
